caveats: Small controlled probe over saved disagreement cases.
Peer messages come from prior multi-agent round-0 outputs; majority and authority conditions reuse one wrong answer as a controlled social cue.
The no-peer baseline is regenerated by this script and may differ from the original multi-agent round-0 answer because the prompt surface differs.
No explicit anti-conformity warning is included in the revision prompt.
Auto-evidence surfaces are model-compressed from peer rationales; the extraction itself may omit, distort, or leak decisive answer information.
Answer-redacted evidence first removes exact parsed-final-answer mentions from the source rationale, but related intermediate numbers can still leak or reconstruct the answer.
command: python scripts/run_peer_exposure_probe.py --run-id 20260614-2325-a8002-peer-redacted-evidence-dar-random14 --out-dir /data/xuhaoming/yfy/research_workspace/experiments/20260614-2325-a8002-peer-redacted-evidence-dar-random14 --base-url http://127.0.0.1:8025/v1 --model qwen2.5-7b-peer-redacted --source-format dar_gsm8k --history-jsonl /data/xuhaoming/yfy/research_workspace/results/dar-trace-filtercritical-gsm8k100-fullhistory-20260613_1730/out/history/gsm8k_100__qwen2.5-7b_N=3_R=1_P=True_V=True_K=None_M=filter_critical_S=42.jsonl --gsm8k-jsonl /data/xuhaoming/yfy/research_workspace/baselines/MAD-MM/processed_data/gsm8k/gsm8k_test.jsonl --selection-mode random --sample-seed 61421 --max-cases 16 --conditions no_peer correct_auto_evidence correct_redacted_evidence correct_rationale wrong_auto_evidence wrong_redacted_evidence wrong_rationale --peer-warning natural --machine A800_2 --gpu-ids 1 --server-log /data/xuhaoming/yfy/research_workspace/logs/peer-redacted-vllm-20260614_2320.log --include-prompts
dataset: GSM8K via DAR shuffled MAD-MM fallback
